%==============================================================================
% cover_letter.tex  --  Jake-style LaTeX cover-letter TEMPLATE for /tailor
%
% /tailor copies this to output/<company>/cover_letter.tex, fills the TWO
% remaining placeholders, then build_cover_letter.py compiles it with pdflatex.
% NO pandoc, NO markdown anywhere.
%
% The BODY IS FIXED -- it is Khoa's vetted voice-anchor prose (opening hook +
% IOE + FPT + Local Lens, all three stories, never cut).
% Do NOT edit, reorder, or drop body paragraphs. Only two things vary per JD:
%   <<Company>>     -- recipient line + salutation
%   <<WHY_COMPANY>> -- the single "why this company" paragraph, between the
%                      % @lint:why-company-start / -end sentinels
%
% Voice is self-deprecating, specific, narrative -- never corporate.
% Honesty: every company fact in <<WHY_COMPANY>> traces 1:1 to the research
% sub-agent (references/honesty-rules.md). No invented numbers. Nothing lints
% the why-company paragraph -- that honesty check is yours. The fixed body is
% exempt: it legitimately attributes the teammate's "XGBoost ... 93%".
%==============================================================================

% ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
% Company insights (audit metadata -- LaTeX comments, never rendered).
% Fill from the research sub-agent; this block stays as comments in the output.
%   url_used: <<url>>
%   impressive_numbers: <<fact-with-number>>; <<...>>
%   notable_specifics: <<product / program / customer / mission>>; <<...>>
% ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

\documentclass[letterpaper,11pt]{article}

\usepackage{latexsym}
\usepackage[empty]{fullpage}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{marvosym}
\usepackage[usenames,dvipsnames]{color}
\usepackage{verbatim}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage[hidelinks]{hyperref}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage[english]{babel}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\input{glyphtounicode}

\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyfoot{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}

% Margins identical to the resume
\addtolength{\oddsidemargin}{-0.5in}
\addtolength{\evensidemargin}{-0.5in}
\addtolength{\textwidth}{1in}
\addtolength{\topmargin}{-.5in}
\addtolength{\textheight}{1.0in}

\urlstyle{same}

\raggedbottom
\raggedright
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{0in}

% Section formatting (same titlerule as the resume)
\titleformat{\section}{
  \vspace{-4pt}\scshape\raggedright\large
}{}{0em}{}[\color{black}\titlerule \vspace{-5pt}]

% Machine readable / ATS parsable
\pdfgentounicode=1

% Letter body spacing: no indent, blank line between paragraphs
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{0.9em}

\begin{document}

%----------HEADING (identical to the resume header)----------
\begin{center}
    \textbf{\Huge \scshape Khoa Ngo} \\ \vspace{1pt}
    \small 448-500-8115 $|$ \href{mailto:kmn24@fsu.edu}{\underline{kmn24@fsu.edu}} $|$
    \href{https://linkedin.com/in/khoa-ngo-7aaa54299/}{\underline{linkedin.com/in/khoa-ngo-7aaa54299}} $|$
    \href{https://github.com/minhkhoango}{\underline{github.com/minhkhoango}}
\end{center}

\vspace{4pt}

%----------DATE & RECIPIENT----------
\today

\vspace{8pt}

<<Company>> Hiring Team

\vspace{8pt}

%----------LETTER BODY (FIXED -- do not edit)----------
Dear <<Company>> team,

I'm a junior CompE at FSU (3.9 GPA, ICPC Gold '24, 1st in Div 2 NA South), but the things I actually want to tell you about are below.

At Interested Opportunity Engine (tiny startup), the team had built an LLM agent with a database but couldn't get it wired to a phone number, and an investor pitch was due the next week. I built a gateway that tied the phone number and agent together, shipped the MVP on time, and the pitch landed --- seed money secured.

At FPT Telecom, we wanted to build a stock-trading system but none of us had touched ML for finance before. I built a Random Forest model at 86\% accuracy on 3 years of Vietnamese stock data, validated against a 3-month holdout. A teammate's XGBoost run later pushed accuracy to 93\%; his model went on to be deployed with \$4{,}000 of test capital.

In my spare time, I got tired of retyping PDF tables into Word for school reports, so I shipped Local Lens, a browser extension that extracts text from images locally. It's at 290+ installs and 60 weekly actives.

%----------WHY THIS COMPANY (the only free-text paragraph)----------
% @lint:why-company-start
<<WHY_COMPANY -- ONE paragraph, 2-3 sentences, on why THIS company. Name at least
one researched fact by its actual value (e.g. "the 74,000+ businesses already on
<<Company>>"), in voice. No invented numbers; every fact traces to the research
sub-agent. This is the ONLY slot you write.>>
% @lint:why-company-end

\vspace{8pt}

Thank you. \\
Sincerely, \\
Khoa Ngo

\end{document}
